name: Excavators
description: Heavy equipment for digging and moving earth.

name: Bulldozers
description: Powerful machines for pushing large quantities of soil.

name: Cranes
description: Machines for lifting and moving heavy materials.

name: Loaders
description: Used to move aside or load materials.

name: Compactors
description: Used to reduce the size of material such as waste biomass or soil.

name: Concrete Mixers
description: Equipment to mix cement, sand, and water.

name: Generators
description: Portable power generators for job sites.

name: Forklifts
description: Powered industrial trucks used to lift and move materials.

name: Tractors
description: Engineering vehicles for agriculture and construction.

name: Graders
description: Heavy equipment with a long blade used to create a flat surface.

name: Drilling Rigs
description: Massive structures used to drill water wells or oil wells.

name: Hand Tools
description: Manual or power tools for detailed work.
